name: Apple Cider Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir together all dry ingredients (flour, salt, baking powder, cinnamon, allspice, nutmeg, cloves) in a separate bowl; set aside.
4. Combine apple cider and vanilla extract in another small bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the batter, alternating with the cider mixture, mixing until well combined.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 10-inch angel food cake pan or fluted tube pan.
7. Bake at 325°F for about 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Meanwhile, combine all icing ingredients (sugar, butter, buttermilk, vanilla extract, baking soda) in a saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
9. Once the cake is done, drizzle about one-third of the icing over the warm cake.
10. Serve the remaining icing over individual servings, if desired.
